requiredInput: REVIEW THE REAL IMPLEMENTATION ONLY. Pull request: https://github.com/Natural-Nation-MVP/natural-nation-mvp/pull/30. Branch: codex/ai-task-002-f8a3628a. Actual changed files: app/frontend/index.html, app/frontend/styles.css, app/frontend/app.js, app/frontend/README.md, app/frontend/tests/validate-foundation.mjs. Actual implementation evidence: index.html contains a Day 1 Journey heading, Wellness Score 85, Rejuvenation Score 92, Duey labeled as an AI wellness mentor, five timed Daily Protocol items with checkboxes, and Daily Check-in controls. styles.css uses a single-column mobile layout, two columns at 768px, three columns at 1024px, green wellness styling, and no explicit focus-visible rules. app.js uses browser alerts, toggles check-in buttons twice because duplicate click listeners are registered, logs check-in data only, and does not persist state. The Duey image uses an external placeholder URL. Review these exact facts and paths. Do not invent src/components, React files, screenshots, user reports, medical metrics, or any simulated evidence. Cite only the five actual app/frontend paths. Identify pass/fail findings for usability, mobile/tablet/desktop responsiveness, accessibility, interaction behavior, non-medical language, and readiness to merge.
expectedOutput: A real evidence-based design review citing only app/frontend paths, clearly separating passes, failures, merge blockers, and recommended corrections
